issues.title: No explanation of what crime types mean
issues.description: A first-time visitor sees labels like 'THEFT', 'BATTERY', 'ASSAULT' but has no idea what these categories cover or how they differ.
reproduction_steps: Look for explanation of crime type categories
issues.expected: A 'What do these categories mean?' section or tooltips
issues.actual: No explanations; raw category names only

issues.title: Table shows no results message when empty
issues.description: If the 'All Crime Types' table has no rows (due to filters), there is no empty state message.
reproduction_steps: Apply filters that return no data
issues.expected: Message: 'No crime types match these filters'

summary: Crime Types page shows data but first-time visitors don't know what the categories mean.
